creator: se@x01.mi.uni-koeln.de
text:
Panic after a few minutes of running new kernel built from
Merged Buffer Cache sources.

I tried a 'make' of the top utility, couldn't get a connection
to the MASTER_SITE, aborted the make, and had the kernel crash
with the following panic message:

biodone: page busy < 0, off: 0, foff: 0, resid: 4096, index: 0
 iosize: 8192, lblkno: 0
 valid: 0xff, dirty: 0x0, mapped: 1
panic: biodone: page busy < 0

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 
Unknown.
